description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge display on the front, featuring a prominent notch at the top for sensors or a front-facing camera. The back of the device is sleek and dark, housing a vertically aligned triple camera array and a small circular flash to the left of the cameras. The sides of the phone are extremely thin, with visible physical buttons likely for power and volume control. The front display shows a vibrant, abstract wallpaper with swirling red, blue, and white colors, giving the device a premium and contemporary appearance. The overall build appears to be a combination of glass and metal, typical of high-end mobile phones. The device is compact, lightweight, and designed for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, triple rear cameras, and a glossy dark finish. The front features a vibrant abstract wallpaper and a top notch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display with a colorful abstract wallpaper and a top notch.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the phone's slimness and the presence of side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a triple camera array, a flash, and a smooth, dark surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the device's thinness and button placement.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a vibrant, abstract wallpaper with swirling red, blue, and white colors. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Three camera lenses are vertically aligned on the upper left of the back, accompanied by a small circular flash to the left of the camera array.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the right edge of the device, likely including a power button and a volume rocker.
